sections.paragraph:
Original: גּוזן

Transliteration: gôzân

Phonetic: go-zawn'

BDB Definition:

Gozan = "a cutting off"
  1. the Mesopotamian city on or near the middle of the Euphrates where exiled Israelites were settled

Origin: probably from H1468

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Location
